case_title: XIN YU WU VS. DALE N. CHEN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIN YU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, XIN YU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, DALE N. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,330.00 FILED BY WU, XIN YU AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, DALE N. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BEN GIANG. NO COSTS IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.
